2603.16002.title: RadAnnotate: Large Language Models for Efficient and Reliable Radiology Report Annotation
2603.16002.paper_summary: Radiology report annotation is essential for clinical NLP, yet manual labeling is slow and costly. We present RadAnnotate, an LLM-based framework that studies retrieval-augmented synthetic reports and confidence-based selective automation to reduce expert effort for labeling in RadGraph. We study RadGraph-style entity labeling (graph nodes) and leave relation extraction (edges) to future work. First, we train entity-specific classifiers on gold-standard reports and characterize their strengths and failure modes across anatomy and observation categories, with uncertain observations hardest to learn. Second, we generate RAG-guided synthetic reports and show that synthetic-only models remain within 1-2 F1 points of gold-trained models, and that synthetic augmentation is especially helpful for uncertain observations in a low-resource setting, improving F1 from 0.61 to 0.70. Finally, by learning entity-specific confidence thresholds, RadAnnotate can automatically annotate 55-90% of reports at 0.86-0.92 entity match score while routing low-confidence cases for expert review.
2603.16002.paper_summary_zh: 放射科報告的註解對臨床自然語言處理至關重要，但手動標註既緩慢又昂貴。<lb/>我們提出了RadAnnotate，一個基於大型語言模型的框架，研究增強檢索的合成報告和基於信心的選擇性自動化，以減少在RadGraph中標註所需的專家努力。<lb/>我們研究RadGraph風格的實體標註（圖形節點），並將關係提取（邊）留待未來工作。<lb/>首先，我們在金標準報告上訓練實體特定分類器，並描述它們在解剖學和觀察類別中的優勢和失敗模式，其中不確定的觀察最難學習。<lb/>其次，我們生成RAG引導的合成報告，並顯示僅使用合成模型的F1分數仍然在金標訓練模型的1-2個點之內，並且合成增強對於低資源環境中不確定的觀察特別有幫助，F1從0.61提高到0.70。<lb/>最後，通過學習實體特定的信心閾值，RadAnnotate可以自動註解55-90%的報告，實體匹配分數為0.86-0.92，同時將低信心案例路由給專家審查。
2603.16002.author: Saisha Pradeep Shetty et.al.
2603.16002.authors: Saisha Pradeep Shetty, Roger Eric Goldman, Vladimir Filkov
